mean_cn: v.产生（读作/prəˈdu:s/）；生产，制造；创作；繁育；制作，拍摄（电影、戏剧等）；栽培；展现；  n.农产品（读作/ˈprɑːduːs/）
mean_en: to make things to be sold, especially in large quantities
sentence: The picking of tomatoes grown by oneself produces a feeling of well-being.
sentence_trans: 采摘自己种的西红柿会产生一种幸福感。
word_etyma: pro向前 + duce引导，带来 → 引向前 → produce生产
